purpose: Brian & Co live feature hub registry.

features.Summary: Protected access hub for Brian & Co systems.
features.Title: Brian & Co Live Feature Hub

features.Summary: Protected local vault, realtime ZIP snapshots, manifests, hash manifests, resume session, handoff continuity, and project recovery preservation.
features.Title: Fort Knox Vault Continuity

features.Summary: Clearly labeled new-project handoff files, upload-first package, registry, manifests, and starter prompt for seamless Brian & Co continuity.
features.Title: Absolute Master Handoff Continuity

features.Summary: Founder dashboard, green-check legal signature system, yellow-circle legal review routing, red rejection routing, approval history, and protected action control.
features.Title: Founder Command Center Master

features.Summary: Role portal network for customers, suppliers, artisans, creators, influencers, lawyers, accountants, investors, bankers, students, veterans, caregivers, civic users, and event partners.
features.Title: Role Portal Network Master

features.Summary: Green checks are legal signatures with signer identity, timestamp, version, notes, document hash, audit log, and signature-chain enforcement.
features.Title: Legal Signature Approval Master

features.Summary: Yellow circle sends items back to lawyer review with Brian notes, revision queue, lawyer response, legal approval, legal revision, or rejection workflow.
features.Title: Lawyer Review Routing Master

features.Summary: All influencers, creators, artisans, suppliers, contractors, consultants, custom workers, and service providers submit portfolios, links, examples, media kits, work samples, and capabilities before approval.
features.Title: Provider Onboarding Portfolio Master

features.Summary: Provider policies are collected, preserved, rewritten into Brian & Co tone, localized, and passed to customers while originals remain stored internally.
features.Title: Provider Policy Tone Master

features.Summary: Custom work providers submit production updates, photos, videos, timelines, milestones, capacity, turnaround, material sources, and customer progress updates.
features.Title: Custom Work Production Master

features.Summary: Custom and made-to-order items are generally non-refundable once production begins, with customer-facing Brian & Co wording and provider compliance tracking.
features.Title: Custom Work Non-Refundable Master

features.Summary: Anyone shipping physical items provides tracking, carrier, shipment status, delay notices, and delivery confirmation monitored for customer updates.
features.Title: Tracking and Shipment Master

features.Summary: Every physical shipment includes Brian & Co white-glove presentation, refined thank-you card, 5% return-customer offer, support details, and branded packaging standards.
features.Title: White Glove Thank You Master

features.Summary: Approved provider images, backgrounds, product photos, profile content, videos, captions, alt text, and copy are preserved as originals and refined into Brian & Co display versions.
features.Title: Brand Image and Tone Master

features.Summary: Uploaded videos are preserved, captioned, subtitled, localized, optionally branded with intro/outro, and converted into Brian & Co display media after approval.
features.Title: Video and Media Brand Master

features.Summary: Website chatbot stays collapsible, expandable, accessible, language-aware, typo-aware, role-aware, and linked to the protected online chatbot continuity layer.
features.Title: Website Chatbot Master

features.Summary: Website chatbot, OS chatbot, role portal chatbot, text/email support, future mobile chatbot, and online chatbot share one protected intelligence registry where configured.
features.Title: OS Chatbot Continuity Master

features.Summary: Brian & Co Intelligence OS core access is free by default, with OS dashboard, launcher, navigation, accessibility, language controls, product visibility, account center, and help center.
features.Title: Free Brian & Co Intelligence OS Foundation

features.Summary: Brian & Co OS shares website, chatbot, entitlement, accessibility, localization, transcript, meeting, recommendation, product, and founder approval intelligence.
features.Title: OS Shared Intelligence Master

features.Summary: Purchased products, digital products, memberships, subscriptions, à la carte upgrades, bundles, role-gated products, and entitled services appear in website, chatbot, private UI, founder UI, and OS.
features.Title: Entitlement Product Registry Master

features.Summary: Protected digital product layer for the Absolute Master Continuity Suite, without activating live Shopify product APIs, payments, or checkout until approved.
features.Title: Absolute Master Continuity Product Master

features.Summary: Accessibility command system for dyslexia, ADHD, autism, dementia, Alzheimer support, PTSD, veterans, caregivers, low vision, hearing, motor, literacy, reduced motion, and cognitive support.
features.Title: Accessibility Intelligence Master

features.Summary: Preferred language, native language, dialect, regional copy, localized onboarding, transcripts, subtitles, product descriptions, chatbot responses, and currency display.
features.Title: Localization Intelligence Master

features.Summary: Live and remote meetings support recording reference, live captions, live translation, searchable transcripts, summaries, action items, improvement suggestions, and customer/provider communication intelligence.
features.Title: Meeting Transcript Master

features.Summary: Video editor concierge with chatbot help, transcripts, subtitles, localization, accessibility, creator asset library, script help, social clips, livestream, and podcast workflows.
features.Title: Creator Video Editor Master

features.Summary: Supplier, artisan, creator, influencer, dropship, white-label, private-label, origin, production, shipping, return, and compliance workflows.
features.Title: Supplier Artisan Commerce Master

features.Summary: Income-tier personalization, ethical recommendations, product-fit scoring, upgrade-fit scoring, shipping/tax awareness, margin awareness, repeat customer incentives, and revenue reporting.
features.Title: Commerce Recommendation Master

features.Summary: Politician, campaign, voter, local media, speech, town hall, event planning, volunteer coordination, local issue tracking, and review workflow scaffolds.
features.Title: Political Civic Campaign Master

features.Summary: Resume builder, job search support, major job site watchlist, remote work support, promotion guidance, raise guidance, certification tracking, and application tracking.
features.Title: Career Resume Job Master

features.Summary: Low-income, homeless, crisis, food, housing, disability, veteran, family, nonprofit, local aid, benefit awareness, and dignity-preserving support pathways.
features.Title: Community Support Master

features.Summary: Doctor, hospital staff, caregiver, elder, cognitive, medication reminder scaffolds, appointment reminder scaffolds, care plan tracking, family coordination, and accessibility routing.
features.Title: Health Caregiver Master

features.Summary: Terms, privacy, returns, cookies, supplier, artisan, creator, influencer, investor, banker, accountant, lawyer, contractor, and role agreements remain draft pending legal review until signed.
features.Title: Legal Contract Policy Lifecycle Master

features.Summary: Receipt photo upload, expense capture, OCR-ready categorization, tax/accounting notes, approval status, accountant review, and audit trail scaffolds.
features.Title: Accountant Receipt Expense Master

features.Summary: Theme health, navigation, broken links, broken images, 404/403 prevention, concierge visibility, accessibility/language presence, no public admin button, and no powered-by wording.
features.Title: Shopify Theme Health Master

features.Summary: Build repair loop, safe tiny fixes, route tests, API tests, desktop/tablet/mobile Playwright scenarios, final gate, deploy only after pass, and post-run reports.
features.Title: Deployment Playwright Master

features.Summary: Future Brian & Co phone, OS, browser, search, laptop, desktop, media editor, and native-first ecosystem planning while core OS stays free.
features.Title: Future OS Device Ecosystem Master

features.Summary: Lawful, consent-aware interaction logging, timestamping, analysis, personalization, FAQ updates, feature recommendations, founder approval, and protected learning registry.
features.Title: Memory Continuity Learning Master

features.Summary: Portfolio, example-work, social links, media kits, policies, legal signatures, founder review, lawyer review, compliance scoring, capacity, turnaround, and provider approval workflows.
features.Title: Provider Lifecycle Intelligence

features.Summary: Production updates, progress photos, progress videos, customer update engine, tracking ingestion, shipment monitoring, delay alerts, delivery confirmation, white-glove fulfillment, thank-you card compliance, and 5 percent return offer.
features.Title: Production and Fulfillment Intelligence

features.Summary: Order confirmation, production updates, tracking updates, delivery confirmation, post-delivery follow-up, concierge support, repeat customer offer, localized messaging, and accessibility-aware communication.
features.Title: White Glove Customer Journey

features.Summary: Customer preferences, preferred communication method, accessibility preferences, language preferences, purchase history, product recommendations, membership visibility, subscription visibility, and entitlement visibility.
features.Title: Customer Intelligence Layer

features.Summary: Website, chatbot, and free Brian and Co OS share entitlement, products, memberships, accessibility, localization, recommendations, notifications, and protected continuity registries.
features.Title: Shared Website Chatbot OS Intelligence

features.Summary: Every purchased product, membership, subscription, upgrade, and digital asset appears in website account, chatbot, private UI, founder UI, and free Brian and Co OS where entitled.
features.Title: Product Visibility Layer

features.Summary: Supplier, artisan, creator, influencer, custom-work, event-vendor, white-label, private-label, and marketplace partner presentation with preserved originals and Brian and Co display versions.
features.Title: Provider Marketplace Expansion

features.Summary: Country of origin, material origin, production timeline, custom order policies, shipping policies, warranty policies, return policies, Brian and Co refined policy versions, and preserved original policy versions.
features.Title: Origin Policy Marketplace Layer

features.Summary: Cheyenne events, Frontier Days, local festivals, local opportunities, vendor applications, founder dashboard alerts, event reminders, and customer event notifications.
features.Title: Local Events and Festival Intelligence

features.Summary: Event vendor, artisan, creator, influencer, supplier, and custom-work participation planning for local events, inventory, staffing, promotion, and post-event reporting.
features.Title: Event Vendor Artisan Creator Participation

features.title: Founder Command Center
features.summary: Private founder-controlled command layer for approvals, legal review, continuity, role systems, supplier intelligence, local events, audit reporting, and next-best-action guidance.

features.title: Role Portal Expansion
features.summary: Native role-aware portal expansion for customers, suppliers, artisans, creators, influencers, lawyers, accountants, investors, bankers, family, and approved Brian & Co users.
